name: Rotisserie Barbecued Leg of Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Insert rotisserie rod through the center of the meat and place on the rotisserie. Cook over coals that have burned down to red and glowing ash. If using a meat thermometer, angle it so the tip is in the center of the meat but not resting in fat or on the rod, and roast until reaching 170°F. If you have no thermometer, roast for 3-1/2 to 4 hours, depending on size of roast.
2. Combine remaining ingredients and brush onto the roast frequently during the last 30 minutes of cooking.
